script.name: !ship.cmd.repairobject.drones
script.sourceplaintext:
[THIS] ->set destination to $a.target [THIS] ->set command: COMMAND_DRONE_REPAIR_OBJECT if $a.target -> is of class Moveable Ship $text = read text: page=9998 id=1010 [THIS] ->set command display override: text=$text else if $a.target -> is of class Station $text = read text: page=9998 id=1011 [THIS] ->set command display override: text=$text end @ = [THIS] -> call script !carrier.recall :
[THIS] ->set destination to $a.target [THIS] ->set command target: $a.target
gosub sub.CheckHaveDrones
while $a.target -> exists $target.sector = $a.target -> get sector do if $target.sector == [SECTOR] break @ = [THIS] -> call script !move.movetosector : sector=$target.sector @ = wait 500 ms end
skip if $a.target -> exists gosub sub.Return
gosub sub.targetWaitForRepair
$size = $a.target -> get size of object if $size $size = $size + 5000 do if $size > 10000 $size = $size + 7500 else $size = 15000 end $x = $a.target -> get x position $y = $a.target -> get y position $z = $a.target -> get z position @ = [THIS] -> call script !move.movetopositioncontinue : sector=[SECTOR] position x=$x position y=$y position z=$z precision=$size
while $a.target -> exists * Break if target has changed sectors skip if [THIS] -> is in same sector as $a.target break
$hull = $a.target -> get hull percent skip if $hull < 100 break
gosub sub.CheckHaveDrones while $i dec $i = $drone = $aDrones[$i] @ do if [THIS] -> call script !lib.carrier.isshipbusy : Ship=$drone Allow Recall=[TRUE] continue START $drone -> command COMMAND_REPAIR_TARGET : arg1=$a.target, arg2=null, arg3=null, arg4=null end
@ = wait 3000 ms end gosub sub.Return return null
* =========================================== * SUB: Order target for repairs to stop in space until repairs are either completed or impossible. * =========================================== sub.targetWaitForRepair: $owner = $a.target -> get owner race do if $owner == Player endsub skip if $a.target -> is of class Moveable Ship endsub do if $a.target -> is stationary flagged endsub skip if $a.target -> get max speed endsub
* Register this carrier with target to use in check in !move.waitforrepair $m7ds = $a.target -> get local variable: name='ships.repairers.m7d' skip if $m7ds $m7ds = array alloc: size=0 if not find [THIS] in array: $m7ds append [THIS] to array $m7ds $a.target ->set local variable: name='ships.repairers.m7d' value=$m7ds end if not $victim -> is script !move.waitforrepair on stack of task=0 if $a.target -> is task 0 in use @ = $victim -> call script plugin.jj.lib.log.object : prepend='Starting !move.waitforrepair from M7D' logFile=9898 $a.target ->interrupt with script !move.waitforrepair and prio 60: arg1=null arg2=null arg3=null arg4=null else @ = $victim -> call script plugin.jj.lib.log.object : prepend='Starting !move.waitforrepair from M7D' logFile=9898 @ START $a.target -> call script !move.waitforrepair : ???=null ???=null end end endsub
* =========================================== * Finish up * =========================================== sub.Return: [THIS] ->set destination to null [THIS] ->set command: COMMAND_NONE [THIS] ->set command target: null
$aDrones = [THIS] ->get managed ships: role=Drone $i = size of array $aDrones while $i dec $i = $drone = $aDrones[$i] $cmd = $drone -> get command do if $cmd == COMMAND_REPAIR_TARGET START $drone -> command COMMAND_NONE : arg1=null, arg2=null, arg3=null, arg4=null end
$m7ds = $a.target -> get local variable: name='ships.repairers.m7d' if $m7ds find and remove: [THIS] from array $m7ds $a.target ->set local variable: name='ships.repairers.m7d' value=$m7ds end
@ = [THIS] -> call script !carrier.recall : return null endsub
* =========================================== * Check we have drones to repair with * =========================================== sub.CheckHaveDrones: $aDrones = [THIS] ->get managed ships: role=Drone $i = size of array $aDrones skip if $i gosub sub.Return endsub return null

comment.var: Break if target has changed sectors
SUB: Order target for repairs to stop in space until repairs are either completed or impossible.
Register this carrier with target to use in check in !move.waitforrepair
Check we have drones to repair with

sval.val: Break if target has changed sectors
SUB: Order target for repairs to stop in space until repairs are either completed or impossible.
Register this carrier with target to use in check in !move.waitforrepair
Check we have drones to repair with
